podcast.name: The Radical Libertarian Podcast
podcast.description: Essays, rants, interviews, and philosophical grenades for people allergic to permission slips.

episodes.title: Welcome to the Unfiltered Republic
episodes.summary: The opening salvo: what this show is, what it is not, and why comfort is overrated.

episodes.title: The Architecture of Digital Serfdom
episodes.summary: Convenience, platform dependency, digital borders, and how the login screen became a checkpoint.

episodes.title: Exit Over Voice
episodes.summary: Why building an escape hatch beats yelling at the suggestion box.

episodes.title: Code Is Speech
episodes.summary: Encryption, privacy, censorship, and why math gives authoritarians night sweats.

episodes.title: The Two-Party Mirage
episodes.summary: When two brands sell the same cage with different bumper stickers.
